title: Implement a landscape maintenance program
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Implement a landscape maintenance program demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Interpret a landscape maintenance program

pcs.text: Identify and apply scope of the maintenance works from the landscape maintenance program and standards
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and apply scope of the maintenance works from the landscape maintenance program and standards?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and apply scope of the maintenance works from the landscape maintenance program and standards.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify potential hazards and risks, and implement safe working practices to manage risks.
